description_long: This is a multi-tiered utility trolley featuring a sturdy metal frame with three large, rectangular blue trays stacked vertically for storage or transport of items. On one side, two black rectangular bins are mounted, likely for waste or sorting purposes, and are supported by a metal extension. The trolley is equipped with four small caster wheels for mobility, and the frame includes a horizontal handlebar for pushing or pulling. The trays and bins are made of plastic, while the frame and handle are metallic, providing both durability and ease of cleaning. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, hospitals, or maintenance settings.
description: A metal-framed utility trolley with three blue trays, two black bins, and four caster wheels for easy mobility. The design is practical and robust, ideal for transporting or sorting items in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing three blue trays, two black bins on the left, and the full length of the handle and frame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open faces of the trays and the two black bins positioned at the rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three blue trays and two black bins now on the right, showing the frame's extension.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the two black bins and the back ends of the trays, with the frame enclosing the bins.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle, metal, straight and horizontal, integrated into the frame for pushing or pulling
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, one at each corner, likely all swivel for maneuverability
